summary: Video with no audio track. It shows aerial drone shots of foreign places (Tehran's Azadi Tower, a village) under a repeated 'HOMESICK?' caption, then CGI airliners painted with country names (COLOMBIA, MYANMAR) flying through sunset clouds, a floating smartphone showing the CBP Home app ('I'm ready to leave the U.S.'), and a closing DHS seal. On-screen text offers a $2,600 stipend.

script.scene: Aerial drone shot of Tehran's Azadi (Freedom) Tower and the surrounding plaza under a clear sky; bold white text 'HOMESICK?' centered over the monument.
Aerial drone shot over a village of tin-roof homes and trees; 'HOMESICK?' text overlaid again.
CGI white commercial airliner labeled 'COLOMBIA' flying through pink and gold sunset clouds; large text 'LIMITED TIME ONLY $2600 STIPEND' with fine print 'OFFER ONLY VALID FOR ILLEGAL ALIENS'.

A floating smartphone over a rendered 'MYANMAR'-labeled jet in the clouds, showing the CBP Home app screen: 'What would you like to do today?' with buttons 'I'm ready to leave the U.S.' and 'Verify I left the U.S.'
DHS Department of Homeland Security seal in white over a blue cloudscape; URL 'DHS.GOV/CBPHOME' at the bottom.

notable_text: HOMESICK?; LIMITED TIME ONLY; $2600 STIPEND; OFFER ONLY VALID FOR ILLEGAL ALIENS; COLOMBIA; MYANMAR; What would you like to do today?; I'm ready to leave the U.S.; Verify I left the U.S.; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
